head.title: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand

div.div:
www.metservice.com is currently unavailable so you have been redirected to our backup site www2.metservice.com.
This site contains all the safety critical information and includes MetService Severe Weather Watches and Warnings, MetService rain radar imagery and brief forecast information.
We are working to restore www.metservice.com as soon as we possibly can. You can also follow us on Facebook @MetService and Twitter @MetService

div.h1: Brief Forecast for all New Zealand
div.p: Cloudy periods. Isolated showers in Northland, spreading elsewhere in the morning.
Waikato to Whanganui, including Bay of Plenty and the central high country
Morning and evening cloud, otherwise mainly fine. Isolated showers about coastal Bay of Plenty at night.
Fine. However, becoming cloudy north of Tokomaru Bay by evening.
Areas of morning and evening low cloud, otherwise mainly fine.
Fine, except for patchy fog or cloud morning and night.
Areas of morning low cloud or fog in the east from Kaikoura Coast to Dunedin, breaking up to become fine. Cloud returning in the evening.
Mostly cloudy. The odd light shower possible.

North Island: Scattered showers on and north of the Central Plateau, and also about Kapiti and Wellington. Mainly fine in the east.
South Island: Showers turning to rain in the west, with heavy falls at night. Scattered rain in the southeast at night.

North Island: Scattered showers in Northland. Periods of rain developing elsewhere, possibly heavy.
South Island: Heavy rain in the west, easing to isolated showers. Scattered falls in the east, clearing.

North Island: Scattered showers, turning to rain in the west late evening.
South Island: Rain developing everywhere, becoming heavy in the north and west.
Cloudy periods. Chance of drizzle on Wednesday, and a period of rain on Friday morning. Northwesterlies develop on Wednesday, becoming strong on Thursday then easing Friday morning.

body.script: var gaJsHost = (("https:" == document.location.protocol) ? "https://ssl." : "http://www."); document.write(unescape("%3Cscript src='" + gaJsHost + "google-analytics.com/ga.js' type='text/javascript'%3E%3C/script%3E"));
